# Contributing to PromptConduit for macOS

Thanks for your interest in contributing. This is a native Swift/SwiftUI app — here's how to get it building locally.

## Prerequisites

- macOS 14.0+ (Sonoma)
- Xcode 15.0+
- [XcodeGen](https://github.com/yonaskolb/XcodeGen): `brew install xcodegen`
- [Zig](https://ziglang.org/): `brew install zig` (required to build GhosttyKit)
- [Claude Code CLI](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code) installed and authenticated

## First-Time Setup

```bash
git clone https://github.com/promptconduit/app.git
cd app

# Build GhosttyKit.xcframework from the ghostty submodule (~5 min)
./scripts/setup.sh

# Generate the Xcode project
cd macOS
xcodegen generate

# Open in Xcode
open PromptConduit.xcodeproj
```

Hit **Cmd+R** to build and run. The app appears in your menu bar.

### GhosttyKit Cache

`setup.sh` caches the built xcframework at `~/.cache/promptconduit/ghosttykit/` keyed by the submodule commit SHA. Subsequent builds skip the Zig compilation step unless the submodule changes.

## Development Notes

- **No hot reload** — Swift changes require a full rebuild (`Cmd+B`) and app restart
- The project file (`PromptConduit.xcodeproj`) is generated by XcodeGen from `project.yml` — don't edit `.xcodeproj` directly
- The app is **not sandboxed**, which is required for file system monitoring and Apple Events

## Pull Request Guidelines

1. **Branch naming:** `feat/description`, `fix/description`, `chore/description`
2. **Never commit directly to main** — always use a feature branch
3. **Test manually** — run the app on your machine and verify the affected feature works
4. **No generated files** — don't commit `PromptConduit.xcodeproj`, `macOS/Frameworks/`, or `ghostty/` build artifacts

## Open Source Guardrails

This repo is public. Please ensure your contributions:

- Do **not** reference platform internals or private API details
- Do **not** include API keys, tokens, or credentials
- Communicate with the platform only via the public `/v1/events/raw` endpoint
